message:
Optimize CI build by skipping dev dependencies

Install only production dependencies in the docs workflow to reduce
CI build times. This skips installing playwright and other dev
dependencies that aren't needed for building the documentation.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -37,7 +37,7 @@ jobs:
           cache: "pnpm"
 
       - name: Install dependencies
-        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
+        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --prod
 
       - name: Setup GitHub Pages
         id: pages
